headline: Xenon Pharmaceuticals Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Xenon Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:XENE) said it is preparing to submit a new drug application to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration in the third quarter of 2026 for azetukalner, its investigational anti-seizure medicine, after reporting positive Phase 3 data in focal onset seizures during the first q
